case_title: UNITED DOMINION REALTY, LP DBA EDGEWATER VS. TRACY BARBA et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED DOMINION REALTY, LP DBA EDGEWATER AS TO DEFENDANT BARBA, TRACY DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE

DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER-CODE CIVIL PROC., 585(D))BY LEON KENNEY, MANAGER OF THE PROPERTY FOR PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED DOMINION REALTY, LP DBA EDGEWATER
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BARBA, TRACY
ORDER RE: USE OF COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINAL DOCUMENTS PER JUDGE PAUL H. ALVARADO.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED DOMINION REALTY, LP DBA EDGEWATER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARBA, TRACY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANTS VACATED PREMISES ON FEBRUARY 2, 2012. $2,948.97 RENT, $345.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,293.97, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
